name: Carob Drop Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients together until smooth.
2. Stir the dry ingredients together separately.
3. Combine the two mixtures.
4. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto oiled baking sheets, spacing about 2 inches apart.
5. Bake for 8-12 minutes at 375°F.
6. Cool on the sheets.
